item.title: Tencent Sells $1.5 Billion Kuaishou Stake as AI Pivot Quickens
item.author: Bloomberg News (English)
item.description: China’s most valuable company sold about 273 million Kuaishou shares at HK$43.25 apiece in the biggest such block trade in Hong Kong this year, according to terms of the deal seen by Bloomberg News. That was toward the lower end of a marketed range and a 6% discount to Kuaishou’s HK$46 Monday close.
